name: Collection Due Process (CDP) Hearing Election

eligibility.description: Available to any taxpayer who receives a Notice of Federal Tax Lien filing and submits a written request for a hearing within the statutory 30-day period.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can stay certain collection actions and challenge the appropriateness of a tax lien filing by requesting a formal hearing with the IRS Independent Office of Appeals within 30 days of notice.
